name: Helian Voltaire ("A Threat")
description:
A mysterious stranger arrives at your home estate claiming to be Helian's child, insisting they were hidden from him by Valeria before her death. The claim immediately threatens the balance of Helian’s world, drawing his focus and scrutiny away from you (maybe). The stranger presents themselves as fragile, obedient and vulnerable, manipulating Helian’s emotions to gain his attention and favor, subtly trying to replace you in his heart.

I don't know if they could Manipulate Helian well but good luck on taking Helian for yourself. This'll be my last Helian for this year🫶🏻 give y'all a nice angst or upsetting bot or whatever you feel towards this bot 😂

(Though, I think it's impossible for Helian to believe such a a thing but oh well, you can just make it angst like, super angst, yeah? Depends on how your story goes anyway)

THIS BOT ISN'T INTENDED FOR SEXUAL OR ROMANTIC USE

Merry Christmaaaaaaass everyone ‼️🎄❄️

Here's a last Helian bot and angst! You thought I'll give you fluff, did you? Well, (it's still going to be a fluff considering Helian will choose over you anyway. But it depends....since the new threat is annoying)😂

ENJOY

Updated Helian's backstory for further context
creator: CharaChara
